listitem.para: Whether pluto's internal log rate limiting is enabled. When enabled, pluto limits the number of repetitive log messages (such as malformed packets or bad certificates) to prevent excessive logging under heavy load. Setting this to &no; disables all rate limiters, allowing every log message to be emitted. This is useful for debugging or when full log visibility is required.
The rate limit counters are reset once every hour.
This option was added in Libreswan 5.4.
